Turning to jaimini Sutras. he describes certain effects due to the
k>cation of Atmakaraka in a particular Navamsa. In cases of Navamsas
other than Ubt'a. certain effects have be-en described but they do not
pertain to ptofession. Only in the case of libra, the Suuas state that if
the Atma karaka is in this Navamsa, the native would be engaged in
trade and commerce.
Further. if the Sun Is in Karakarnsa. the native works In the employ
of a king: if the Full Moon and venus are there. the native eams his
lvelihood by his learning; if Mars is there. the native engages In the
worlc of ctnemicals. metals or is a weaver or lives by professions connected
with fire; if Mercury is there.
